baseline.subject: Add Mira Core Phase 30 runtime control path validation
baseline.baseline_boundary: Phase 30 is committed as validation-only control-path metadata. No real runtime, server, listener, route, network path, database, store, file write, migration, queue, lease, auth, key, secret, local execution, shell, PTY, send, deploy, trade, output-file, durable memory/profile commit, capture, or external side effect exists at this baseline.

purpose: Refresh the Mira Core readiness and phase registry through Phase 30.
Mark Phase 23 milestone readiness as stale and superseded because it indexed only Phases 1-22.
Define the next safe build slice after Phase 30 without implementing, enabling, or authorizing runtime.

Carry forward runtime/control-path truth: runtime_started=false, runtime_available_now=false, eligible_is_authorization=false, serverCanExecuteLocal=false, direct Builder/Oracle server targets blocked, proof boundaries false, side-effect truth, and unsafe action drift blocks.
nonGoals: No real server, listener, route, HTTP, WebSocket, or network behavior.

No database, store, file, migration, queue, lease, output-file, auth, key, secret, env secret read, local execution, shell, PTY, browser, screenshot, OCR, send, deploy, trade, memory/profile commit, export, delete, restore, capture, or raw-content storage behavior.

No claim that a socket, delivery acceptance, control-path metadata, CLI acceptance, local acceptance, or milestone refresh proves model processing, bridge green, local-arm execution, or runtime availability.
builderPatchMustSatisfy: Inventory exactly Phases 1 through 30 with expected fixture, module, CLI, test, schema, commit, status, and boundary truth.
Register exactly 30 fixture schemas and exactly 30 CLI paths.
Preserve the commit chain through 679e018 in order.
Mark Phase 13 readiness as stale after Phase 14 and Phase 23 milestone readiness as stale after Phase 24-30.
Carry forward Phase 22 ORACLE #78/#79/#80 closure and Phase 30 ORACLE #115 closure.
Keep Phase 30 runtime-control-path as validation-only and non-authorizing.

Reject stale phase count, stale commit chain, missing Phase 30 closure, runtime overclaims, side-effect overclaims, unsafe action drift, direct Builder/Oracle server targets, and raw/private/secret output.
Recommend only Tier0 or Tier1 next work, likely a disabled local dry-run runner contract or operator status UI contract, never live runtime.

commitChainExpected.meaning: Mira Core initial snapshot through stale Phase 13 readiness baseline

nextRecommendationExpectedCandidates.title: Create fixture-only disabled local dry-run runner contract
Create fixture-only operator status UI contract

staticValidationRules.description: Manifest inventories exactly Phases 1-30 and no future phase as implemented.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Phase count is not 30, any phase number is missing, or a future phase is mislabeled as present.

staticValidationRules.description: Schema registry contains exactly one fixture schema entry per Phase 1-30.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Schema count is not 30 or any fixture schema/path pair is missing.

staticValidationRules.description: CLI registry contains exactly one stdout-only, no-output-file CLI path per Phase 1-30.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: CLI count is not 30, a path is missing, output-file behavior is allowed, or runtime side effects are allowed.

staticValidationRules.description: Commit chain includes the expected 18 commits in order through Phase 30 baseline 679e018.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Commit chain is missing a known phase commit, out of order, or ends before 679e018.

staticValidationRules.description: Phase 13 and Phase 23 readiness artifacts are marked stale/superseded rather than current for all phases.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Either stale readiness artifact is treated as the current registry for Phases 1-30.

staticValidationRules.description: Phase 30 closure records exact Phase 29 prerequisite mapping and recomputed-idempotency bogus-map rejection.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: ORACLE #115 closure is missing, marked unknown, or not bound to Phase 30 evidence.

staticValidationRules.description: Phase 30 control path remains remain_control_path_contract_only and cannot authorize runtime.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Output claims eligible means authorization, runtime started, runtime available, or control path proves runtime.

staticValidationRules.description: Runtime, server local execution, model-processing proof, and direct Builder/Oracle server targeting remain false.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Any capability boundary is promoted to true or proof text implies real runtime.

staticValidationRules.description: The refresh is a read-only validation manifest with all runtime/server/network/store/execution/output side effects blocked.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Any side-effect truth field is false or any side-effect counter is nonzero.

staticValidationRules.description: Next recommendations and report text cannot drift into customer send, deploy, trade, money, capture, local execution, shell, PTY, or durable commit work.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Unsafe action wording appears in a recommended action, why-safe text, or allowed capability.

staticValidationRules.description: Next recommendations are Tier0/Tier1 only and explicitly non-authorizing.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: A recommendation is Tier2+, live runtime, network/server work, external side effect, or lacks does_not_authorize_runtime=true.

staticValidationRules.description: Blocker summary includes real runtime, control wiring, operator UI/status, persistence/network, durable memory/profile, capture/execution/sends/deploys/trades, stale Phase 23 readiness, and local-arms proof blockers.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: A required blocker is omitted or falsely marked solved.

staticValidationRules.description: Manifest and validation output do not expose raw comms, terminal, OCR/browser state, secrets, tokens, keys, customer private data, side-profile content, raw paths, or decrypted payloads.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Forbidden private or secret content appears in string values.

staticValidationRules.description: Equivalent registry inputs produce stable idempotency; phase inventory, commit chain, schema registry, CLI registry, baseline, or next recommendations change the key.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Idempotency ignores registry or baseline changes.

staticValidationRules.description: Validation report counts, decisions, closure results, capability truth, unsafe action result, and side-effect truth match the manifest.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Validation report says accepted while manifest fields violate required values.

tamperCases.mutate: Remove Phase 30 from phase_inventory after recomputing idempotency.
Set runtime_available_now=true and runtime_started=true after recomputing idempotency.
Allow Builder or Oracle direct server target after recomputing idempotency.
Change next recommendation title or why_safe to send email to customer after recomputing idempotency.
Set no_output_file_written=false and outputFilesWritten=1 after recomputing idempotency.
Remove commit 679e018 or reorder the commit chain after recomputing idempotency.

greenOnlyIf: Only this Oracle fixture is added for Phase 31 validation.
Phase inventory, schema registry, and CLI registry each count exactly 30.
Commit chain contains exactly 18 expected commits and ends at 679e018.
Phase 23 readiness is marked stale/superseded by Phase 31.
Phase 30 ORACLE #115 closure is carried forward.
Runtime/control-path capability truth remains false and non-authorizing.
Next recommendations are Tier0/Tier1 and do not authorize runtime.
Side-effect truth fields all remain true/zero.
No forbidden raw/private/secret/runtime/proof/action strings appear in output values.
git diff --check is clean for the fixture.
